description: BH1750 light + SHT3x temp/humidity through TCA9548A mux
hardware: elegoo_dynamic — BH1750 on ch7, SHT3x on ch5 of HW-617 mux
notes: SHT3x temperature and humidity share I2C address 0x44 on the same mux channel.
The path matcher matches the first sensor with that path (temperature).
Humidity keeps its compile-time name. This is a known limitation of
path-only matching when virtual sensors share an address.
